import logging
import signal
import sys

_shutdown_requested = False

def sigint_handler(signum, frame):
    # Correct: set a lightweight flag or global variable; do IO operations safely in the main loop
    global _shutdown_requested
    _shutdown_requested = True

signal.signal(signal.SIGINT, sigint_handler)

def main_loop():
    while not _shutdown_requested:
        pass
    logging.info("Received SIGINT safely outside signal handler, shutting down...")
